purpose: Reference for Electron-side configuration: settings.js JSON-backed store, vite.config.js renderer build setup, electron-builder packaging targets, and the custom app:// protocol resolution chain. Covers persistent settings keys, window state, and dev/prod path handling.
gotchas: settings.js writes to userData on save; do not call from renderer directly
app:// protocol must be registered before app.ready or it silently fails
Production paths differ from dev — always use the path helpers
patterns: JSON file persistence with debounced writes
Custom protocol with fallback path search (root → dist → public)
Vite for renderer, electron-builder for packaging
conventions: Settings store keyed by string namespaces
